news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance ETFs Launches OKLS: The First 2X Short ETF of Oklo Inc.

holdings.infoBox: OKLS is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash Offset stock at 273.88%, US DOLLARS at 44.30%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 33.06%, First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 1.19%, and OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at -14.12%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Short OKLO ETF (OKLS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in utilities equity. The fund seeks to provide 2x inverse exposure to the daily share price movement of Oklo Inc. (NASDAQ: OKLO), less fees and expenses. OKLS was launched on Nov 25, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
